heading: Applicability of certain statutes
label: 691d Applicability of certain statutes
text: Sections 715f to 715i and 715 to 715n of this title are made applicable for the purposes of sections 691, 691a, and 691c of this title in the same manner and to the same extent as though they were enacted as a part of those sections.l1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSections 715 and 715m of this title, referred to in text, were repealed by , , . See section 668dd(f) and (e) of this title.lPub. L. 89–669, § 7(d)80 Stat. 930Oct. 15, 1966
amendments: References in TextSections 715 and 715m of this title, referred to in text, were repealed by , , . See section 668dd(f) and (e) of this title.lPub. L. 89–669, § 7(d)80 Stat. 930Oct. 15, 1966
